title: antirrhinum siculum var. tortuosum
intro: Antirrhinum siculum var. tortuosum, commonly known as the twisted snapdragon, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Antirrhinum siculum var. tortuosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of allergies, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and soothe digestive issues.
